name: R2 Locking Nut
description: Original-style hardened steel locking nut; 41.3mm overall width for necks with a 1-5/8 inch nut slot

name: R3 Locking Nut
description: Hardened steel locking nut; 42.85mm overall width with reduced string spacing matching the R2 for necks with a 1-11/16 inch nut slot

name: R4 Locking Nut
description: Hardened steel locking nut; 43mm overall width with standard wider string spacing for necks with a 1-11/16 inch nut slot

name: 1000 Series Locking Nut
description: Hardened steel locking nut for Korean-made 1000 Series and Special tremolo systems; same dimensions as the Original nut

name: FRX Top-Mount Locking Nut
description: Locking nut designed for the FRX surface-mount system; mounts above the existing nut in place of the truss rod cover using two wood screws

name: 8-String Locking Nut
description: Hardened steel locking nut for the Floyd Rose 8-String Tremolo System; 18 inch radius to match extended-range neck profiles
